metadata.documentationPosture: future-workstream documentation update; no runtime implementation

closedDecisions.SC-DEC-001: Module is a PCC-native Subcontractor Scorecard, hosted under the existing `subcontractor-performance` work center, not a spreadsheet launcher and not a Procore/Compass/Sage replacement.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-002: Initial documentation placement is `docs/architecture/blueprint/sp-project-control-center/future-workstreams/subcontractor-scorecard/`; do not insert this into Phase 3 Waves 8-14 or alter current MVP sequencing.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-003: Future runtime implementation begins read-model/fixture-first and read-only; workflow write routes require a later explicit mutation gate.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-004: Primary record is `SubcontractorScorecardProjectInstance`. Versioned scoring template is `SubcontractorScorecardTemplate`.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-005: PCC owns scorecard workflow state, reviewer judgment, scoring outputs, recommendation, publication state, audit events, source-lineage classification, and derived analytics.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-006: Procore owns Procore-native commitments, submittals, RFIs, punch/deficiency items, observations/inspections where generated in Procore, companies, and Procore URLs.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-007: Sage owns accounting truth for official cost/final value where integrated; Procore operational financial context must be labeled as operational.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-008: Compass/Bespoke Metrics remains a prequalification/risk source when integrated; PCC does not mutate or replace it.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-009: SharePoint/HB Document Control owns evidence/document binaries. Scorecards store evidence links and source lineage only.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-010: Workbook category weights are frozen for v1: Safety 20%, Quality 20%, Schedule 20%, Cost 15%, Communication 15%, Workforce 10%.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-011: Factor scoring uses 1-5 integers only. Category score is average of applicable factor scores. Overall score is weighted average of applicable category scores.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-012: N/A is allowed only with required justification and evidence/context note; N/A categories/factors are excluded from denominator and applicable weights are redistributed.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-013: Safety & Compliance cannot be marked N/A unless Project Executive override exists with reason and evidence.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-014: Future work recommendation replaces binary rebid language; allowed values are `recommended`, `recommended-with-conditions`, `use-with-risk-controls`, `requires-executive-procurement-review`, `not-recommended-for-similar-scope`, `insufficient-data`.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-015: Scorecard is a decision-support record only. It cannot automatically disqualify, blacklist, debar, default, terminate, or block a subcontractor.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-016: Draft and returned scorecards are visible only to PM, Superintendent, PX, assigned reviewers, and explicitly authorized project leadership. Estimating/procurement consume approved/published summaries only.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-017: Published portfolio rollups include approved/published scorecards only; drafts, disputed records, evidence-review-required records, and insufficient-data records are excluded.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-018: Approved scorecards cannot be edited in place. Corrections create a revision and supersede the prior approved version after reapproval.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-019: Scorecard completion may become a closeout readiness gate, but it cannot block project closeout by itself without PM/PX override workflow.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-020: HBI may summarize, draft narrative, identify source gaps, and suggest risk-control language; HBI cannot score, approve, publish, exclude, or reveal restricted comments autonomously.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-021: All external integrations remain backend-mediated. Direct SPFx-to-Procore, direct SPFx-to-Sage, Compass mutation, external writeback, and full mirror behavior are prohibited.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-022: Audit history is business-grade and must record score, status, reviewer, evidence-link, publication, correction, and HBI-human-acceptance events.
closedDecisions.SC-DEC-023: No open implementation decisions remain in this target architecture package. Future agents must implement these decisions unless a new approved architecture decision supersedes them.

sourceWorkbook.role: source field inventory, scoring seed, and taxonomy; not target UX

scoring.categoryScoreRule: average applicable factor scores; exclude N/A factors from denominator

factors.criterion: Adherence to site safety plan and OSHA standards

factors.sourceEvidenceHint: Daily clean, lay-down areas, debris removal

factors.criterion: Corrective action response to safety issues
factors.sourceEvidenceHint: Time to close NCRs / safety violations
% commitments kept on Last Planner / pull plan
Added crew, extended hours, phasing coordination
Change order volume vs. scope growth
Days to submit COs, fair pricing
No stoppages due to unpaid suppliers

factors.criterion: Billing accuracy and schedule of values quality
Responsiveness to RFIs, emails, and calls
Participation in OAC and coordination meetings
Workforce skill level and supervision ratio
Compliance with labor requirements (certified payroll, etc.)
factors.sourceEvidenceHint: MBE/DBE, prevailing wage, union rules if applicable

ratingBands.label: Exceptional
ratingBands.meaning: Strong candidate for future similar work; still requires project-specific risk review.

ratingBands.label: Above Average
ratingBands.meaning: Generally strong performer with limited controls or monitoring.

ratingBands.label: Satisfactory
ratingBands.meaning: Acceptable performance; normal procurement and project controls apply.

ratingBands.label: Below Average
ratingBands.meaning: Use caution; future award requires PM/PX/procurement review and defined controls.

ratingBands.label: Unsatisfactory
ratingBands.meaning: Not recommended for similar scope without executive/procurement review and documented risk-control plan.

ratingBands.label: Insufficient Data
ratingBands.meaning: Not enough reliable project evidence to publish a score.

SubcontractorScorecardTemplate.description: Versioned scoring template including categories, weights, factor definitions, validation profile, publication rules, and template status.

SubcontractorScoreCategoryScore.description: Category score plus factor scores, comments, N/A justifications, and evidence links.

SubcontractorPerformanceEvidenceLink.description: Reference-only link to source evidence; no binary storage.

SubcontractorRiskControlPlan.description: Future-work risk controls tied to scorecard recommendation.

SubcontractorPortfolioSummary.description: Approved/published rollup by subcontractor, trade, project type, region, and trend.
